settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Select your preferred language for the interface.
settings.clearLocalBrowserDataDesc: Remove cached threads, profile settings, and auth state from this browser only. Server-side files and thread permissions are not deleted.
settings.providerProfilesDesc: Each profile stores a complete LLM configuration. Your keys stay in this browser and are only sent to your configured Ethos backend at request time.
settings.defaultModelDesc: This model will be selected by default when starting new conversations.
settings.defaultModeDesc: Choose how the assistant should behave by default.
settings.securityDesc: Set your default permission profile for new chats. Temporary approvals during a chat still live on the thread until you save them as defaults.
settings.useServerDefaultDesc: Active. No personal override. New chats inherit the backend default mode.
settings.defaultPermDesc: Reads are generally allowed. Edits and risky shell actions ask first.
settings.acceptEditsDesc: Workspace edits are allowed, but shell still goes through safety checks.
settings.bypassPermissionsDesc: Most asks are auto-allowed unless explicitly denied or safety-blocked.
settings.dontAskDesc: Any action that would ask instead becomes a deny.
settings.defaultWorkingDirsDesc: One path per line. Relative paths are resolved from the chat workspace root.
settings.defaultRulesDesc: Format: subject | behavior | matcher. Matcher is optional. Subjects: read, edit, bash, powershell.
settings.noProfilesDesc: No profiles yet. Add one to start chatting.
settings.apiKeysDesc: Your keys stay in this browser and are only sent to your configured Ethos backend at request time.
settings.confirmClearLocalData: Clear local UI state and reload this browser session?

composer.placeholder: Delegate a task or ask a question...
composer.helpText: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line
composer.addProfileToChat: Add a profile in Settings to start chatting

emptyState.title: What can I do for you?
emptyState.subtitle: Move from idea to execution in one workspace: plan slides, draft websites, scope desktop apps, and design polished product flows without switching contexts.
emptyState.createSlidesDesc: Create a polished slide deck for a product strategy review.
emptyState.buildWebsiteDesc: Build a responsive marketing website with clear sections and calls to action.
emptyState.developDesktopAppsDesc: Plan and scaffold a desktop app with the right architecture and packaging approach.
emptyState.designDesc: Design a clean, modern product experience for this workflow.

permissions.savedDefault: Saved as your default permission profile.
permissions.approvalApplied: Approval applied. Retrying the blocked action...
permissions.blockedByPermissions: This chat is blocked by permissions
permissions.approvalsTemporary: Approvals here are temporary for this thread. Use settings only if you want to change your defaults.
